content: Drizzle ORM + Neon setup: 1) drizzle-orm/neon-http adapter for Next.js API routes (serverless): import { neon } from '@neondatabase/serverless'; import { drizzle } from 'drizzle-orm/neon-http'; const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL!); const db = drizzle({ client: sql }). 2) drizzle.config.ts: defineConfig({ out: './drizzle', schema: './src/db/schema.ts', dialect: 'postgresql', dbCredentials: { url: process.env.DATABASE_URL! } }). 3) Migration commands: drizzle-kit generate (creates SQL in drizzle/ dir), drizzle-kit migrate (applies them). Use direct (non-pooled) connection for migrations, not pooled URL. drizzle-kit push for dev quick iterations. 4) For long-lived Node.js process (relay/daemon), use drizzle-orm/node-postgres with pg pool. 5) Neon free tier: scale-to-zero, 1 database, instant branching for dev. DATABASE_URL from Neon console, two strings available: direct and pooled.
